---
id: download-report
title: "Download Transaction Report File"
description: "Download a report file using the secure token from the list endpoint. Returns the file as binary (CSV or XLSX). Tokens are time-limited, user-bound, and rate-limited."
sidebar_label: "Download Transaction Report File"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: developers/apis/ottu-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Download Transaction Report File"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/b/api/v1/reports/files/{token}/download/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Download a report file using the secure token from the list endpoint. Returns the file as binary (CSV or XLSX). Tokens are time-limited, user-bound, and rate-limited.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>
